steps.title: Recognize an indirect question
steps.content: The sentence says the team set out to investigate how something could be regulated. That is an indirect question inside a declarative sentence, so it needs statement word order and a period.

steps.title: Eliminate direct-question forms
steps.content: A and D use inverted question word order, putting could before the subject. C uses statement word order but ends the declarative sentence with a question mark. The correct completion keeps the subject before the verb and ends with a period. The answer is B.
